zh.lifeSummary: 當Queen Ingeborg Eriksdatter of Denmark於大約1244年出生在丹麥時，她的父親KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark29歲，母親Jutta of Saxony23歲。她和Magnus VI of Norway至少有4個兒子。她去世於1287年3月26日在挪威伯根享年44歲。

zh-hans.Tonsberg, Bergen, Norway: 挪威維斯特福爾德奧斯格
zh-hans.Tønsberg, Vestfold, Norway: 挪威維斯特福爾德奧斯格
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Queen Ingeborg Eriksdatter of Denmark于大约1244年出生在丹麦时，她的父亲KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark29岁，母亲Jutta of Saxony23岁。她和Magnus VI of Norway至少有4个儿子。她去世于1287年3月26日在挪威伯根享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ingeborg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name from the name of the fertility god Ing + borg ‘fortification’.

en.lifeSummary: When Queen Ingeborg Eriksdatter of Denmark was born about 1244, in Denmark, her father, KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark, was 29 and her mother, Jutta of Saxony, was 23. She had at least 4 sons with Magnus VI of Norway. She died on 26 March 1287, in Bergen, Norway, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Queen Ingeborg Eriksdatter of Denmark est née environ 1244, à Danemark, son père, KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Jutta of Saxony, avait 23 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils avec Magnus VI of Norway. Elle est décédée le 26 mars 1287, à Bergen, Norvège, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Queen Ingeborg Eriksdatter of Denmark um 1244 in Dänemark geboren wurde, war ihr Vater KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark 29 und ihre Mutter Jutta of Saxony 23. Sie hatte mit Magnus VI of Norway mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb am 26. März 1287 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Bergen, Norwegen.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Queen Ingeborg Eriksdatter of Denmark è nata il circa 1244 nel Danimarca, sua padre, KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Jutta of Saxony, aveva 23 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli con Magnus VI of Norway. Morì il 26 marzo 1287, nel Bergen, Norvegia, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.Vestfold, Norway: ノルウェーベストフォルド
ja.Bergen, Norway: ノルウェーバージェン
ja.Tonsberg, Bergen, Norway: ノルウェーベストフォルドトoンスバーグ
ja.Tønsberg, Vestfold, Norway: ノルウェーベストフォルドトoンスバーグ
ja.lifeSummary: Queen Ingeborg Eriksdatter of Denmarkが約1244年にデンマークで生まれた時，父KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmarkは29歳，母Jutta of Saxonyは23歳であった。彼女はMagnus VI of Norwayとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1287年3月26日にノルウェーバージェンで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Queen Ingeborg Eriksdatter of Denmark(이)가 대략 1244년 덴마크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jutta of Saxony(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 Magnus VI of Norway(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1287년 3월 26일 노르웨이 버겐에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Queen Ingeborg Eriksdatter of Denmark nasceu aproximadamente 1244, em Dinamarca, seu pai, KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Jutta of Saxony, tinha 23 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Magnus VI of Norway. Ela faleceu em 26 de março de 1287, em Bergen, Noruega, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Queen Ingeborg Eriksdatter of Denmark родилась около 1244 г. в местности Дания, её отцу по имени KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Jutta of Saxony, 23. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына от Magnus VI of Norway. Она умерла 26 марта 1287 г. в местности биржен, Норвегия в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Queen Ingeborg Eriksdatter of Denmark nació aproximadamente 1244, en Dinamarca, su papá, KING Erik IV Plovpenning of Denmark, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Jutta of Saxony, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con Magnus VI of Norway. Murió el 26 de marzo de 1287, en Bergen, Noruega, a la edad de 44 años.
